    G

    gainXP() - Method in class sims.actions.Activity
    Placeholder method for awarding experience points (XP) to a Sim when performing this activity.
    Game - Class in sims.gameEngine

    GameState - Class in sims.gameEngine
     
    GameState() - Constructor for class sims.gameEngine.GameState
     
    getActivity() - Method in class sims.world.HomeUpgrade
    Returns the activity associated with this upgrade.
    getActivity() - Method in class sims.world.Loc
    Returns the list of activities available at this location.
    getActivityEnd() - Method in class sims.entity.Sim
     
    getAge() - Method in class sims.entity.Sim
     
    getBank() - Method in class sims.entity.Sim
     
    getBonus() - Method in class sims.career.Career
    Calculates the bonus based on the career level.
    getCareer() - Method in class sims.entity.Sim
     
    getComparison() - Method in class sims.world.OutsideLocation
    Returns the comparison condition associated with this location.
    getCost() - Method in class sims.actions.Activity
    Returns the financial cost of performing this activity.
    getDecayRate() - Method in class sims.needs.need
    Returns the decay rate of the need.
    getDuration() - Method in class sims.actions.Activity
    Returns the duration of the activity in world time units.
    getFriendshipLevel() - Method in class sims.entity.Relationship
    Returns the current friendship level.

    getGameState() - Method in class sims.gameEngine.GameState
     
    getHome() - Method in class sims.entity.Sim
     
    getHome() - Method in class sims.world.HomeLocation
    Returns the parent home of this location.
    getHomeLocation() - Method in class sims.world.Home
    Returns the list of sub-locations that belong to this home.
    getImpactedNeed() - Method in class sims.actions.Activity
    Returns the need impacted by this activity.
    getIntTime() - Method in class sims.gameEngine.GameState
     
    getLevel() - Method in class sims.career.Career
    Returns the current career level.
    getLocation() - Method in class sims.entity.Sim
     
    getLocation() - Method in class sims.world.HomeUpgrade
    Returns the location where this upgrade applies.
    getLocSimList() - Method in class sims.world.HomeLocation
    Returns the list of Sims currently present in the parent home.
    getLocSimList() - Method in class sims.world.Loc
    Returns the list of Sims currently present at this location.
    getName() - Method in class sims.actions.Activity
    Returns the name of the activity.
    getName() - Method in class sims.entity.Sim
     
    getName() - Method in class sims.world.HomeUpgrade
    Returns the name of this upgrade.
    getName() - Method in class sims.world.Loc
    Returns the name of this location.
    getNeeds() - Method in class sims.entity.Sim
     
    getOtherSim(Sim) - Method in class sims.entity.Relationship
    Returns the other Sim in the relationship given one Sim.
    getPrice() - Method in class sims.world.HomeUpgrade
    Returns the price of this upgrade.
    getRelationshipMap() - Method in class sims.entity.Sim
     
    getRequirement() - Method in class sims.world.OutsideLocation
    Returns the requirement condition associated with this location.
    getSalary() - Method in class sims.career.Career
    Returns the base salary of the career.
    getSector() - Method in class sims.career.Career
    Returns the job sectir of the career.

    getTitle() - Method in class sims.career.Career
    Returns the job title of the career.
    getUpgrade() - Method in class sims.world.HomeUpgrade
    Returns whether this upgrade has been purchased.
    getUpgradeList() - Method in class sims.world.HomeLocation
    Returns the list of upgrades applied to this home location.

    getValue() - Method in class sims.actions.Activity
    Returns the value by which the impacted need is modified.
    getValue() - Method in class sims.needs.need
    Returns the current value of the need.
